raw_response_text:
<explanation>
The query image shows a flower with light pink/white petals that have dark pink/reddish speckles or spots near the center. This pattern of speckled petals is visually similar to the red flower in class 71, although the color is different. Class 68 is a solid white flower with a yellow center, and class 33 is a solid pink flower with a yellow center. The presence of distinct speckling/spotting on the petals makes class 71 the most appropriate choice among the provided options.
</explanation>

<response>71</response>
